title: ESIC Hospital Tirunelveli – Specialist, Senior Resident & Medical officer – 25 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 25 Specialist, Senior Resident & Medical officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Hospital Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in Interview for 25 Specialist, Senior Resident & Medical officer Posts on 01 June 2026 at Tirunelveli. Check vacancy details, eligibility criteria, salary, selection process and interview venue information here.
basic_details.organization_name: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Tirunelveli
basic_details.post_name: Full Time Specialist, Part Time Specialist, Senior Resident (3 Years), Medical Officer

age_limit.age_details: As mentioned in the table below (relaxation applicable as per rules).

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time Specialist: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty + 3 years experience after PG. Part Time Specialist: Same as above. Senior Resident (3 Yr): MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty. Medical Officer: MBBS with 2 years experience (1 year in Gen. Medicine/Surgery).

how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in Interview. No prior online application is required. Eligible candidates should directly report to the venue on the scheduled date.
